name: HighKey Mini Cookies Double Chocolate Brownie
notes: DB says 150 cal/6 cookies/4g protein/14g fat. Verified 140 cal/7 cookies/5g protein/12g fat. Serving size also differs (6 vs 7 cookies). Multiple sources confirm 140 cal.

name: HighKey Mini Cookies Snickerdoodle
notes: Exact match on all macros. Some sources say 6 pieces per serving but EatThisMuch confirms 10 cookies (28g). DB values accurate.

name: HighKey Sugar-Free Sandwich Cookies (Original/Vanilla Creme)
notes: DB says 70 cal/3 cookies/22g carbs/5g fat/9g fiber. Verified 60 cal/2 cookies/17g carbs/4g fat/7g fiber. Serving size wrong (3 vs 2 cookies) and calories off by 10. The 3-cookie/70-cal entry in DB may be a different or outdated formulation.

name: Mini Brownie Bites
notes: DB calories match at 140 but macros are very different. DB says 10g protein/16g carbs/8g fat — verified is 5g protein/11g carbs/12g fat. DB macros appear to be from a different product (possibly Protein Cookie line, not Brownie Bites).

name: Protein Chocolate Chip Cookie
notes: DB says 150 cal/10g protein/16g carbs/8g fat. Verified 140 cal per ~28g serving with 3g protein/13g fat. DB macros appear copied from a different HighKey product line (the Protein Mini-Cookies bag has 21g protein per full bag, not per serving). Regular mini cookies are 140 cal/3g protein.

name: Sugar-Free Sandwich Cookies (Chocolate)
notes: Calories confirmed at 60. All macros match the verified values for 2-cookie serving.

name: Big Dog XXL Extra Lean Beef Franks
notes: All values match. 90 cal, 10g protein, 5g carbs, 4g fat, 1g sugar per frank.

name: POINTS! Krunch Protein Milk Chocolate
notes: Calories match at 140. DB says 8g protein but verified is 7g. Other macros consistent. Protein difference is minor (1g). Could not get full detailed label from official site JS-heavy page but Amazon/multiple sources confirm 140 cal/7g protein.

name: POINTS! Rainbow Dark Chocolate Candies
notes: All values match exactly. 90 cal, 3g protein, 17g carbs, 8g fat, 7g fiber, 1g sugar per 1 oz bag.

name: Sugar Free Gelatin
notes: DB says serving is 1 cup at 10 cal. Official serving is 1/2 cup at ~10 cal. If serving is truly 1 cup, it would be ~20 cal. Need to clarify: DB likely means 1/2 cup = 10 cal (which is correct), but label says '1 cup' which would double it.

name: Zero Sugar Hard Candy
notes: Calories match at 35. DB says 14g carbs but verified is 16g total carbs (mostly sugar alcohols, 0g net). Minor carb difference due to sugar alcohol counting. Calories correct.

name: Healthy Pop Butter
notes: All values match. 80 cal, 2g protein, 16g carbs, 2g fat, 3g fiber for 4 cups popped. 94% fat free.

name: Low Carb High Protein Pasta
notes: Calories match at 130. DB says 17g fiber but EatThisMuch says 15g and FatSecret says 17g. DB says 2g sugar, verified closer to 1-2g. Fiber varies by source (15-17g) possibly due to formulation changes. Updating to 15g per EatThisMuch (more recent). Calories and protein confirmed.

name: Natural Fat Free Cheddar Shredded Cheese
notes: All values match. 45 cal, 9g protein, 2g carbs, 0g fat per 1/4 cup (28g). Great protein-to-calorie ratio.

name: Electrolyte Mix
notes: DB says 0 cal. Verified is technically 5 cal per stick from trace carbs. Functionally zero — well within rounding tolerance. No update needed.

name: Chocolate Protein Donut
notes: Calories match at 160. DB says 16g carbs/8g fat/1g fiber/2g sugar. Verified is 26g total carbs/6g fat/8g fiber/0g sugar. DB total carbs are significantly understated (16 vs 26). DB fiber of 1g is way off (verified 8g). Sugar alcohols account for the difference between total and net carbs.

name: Chocolate Sweet Roll
notes: Calories match at 210. DB says 18g carbs/6g fat/1g fiber/2g sugar. Verified 24g carbs/11g fat/8g fiber/1g sugar. Fat significantly understated in DB (6 vs 11g). Total carbs and fiber both wrong.

name: Legendary Birthday Cake Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 16g carbs/6g fat. Verified ~22g total carbs/8g fat. DB total carbs understated. Pastry line generally has 20-22g total carbs, 8g fat, 8-9g fiber per pastry. DB fiber of 8g is correct.

name: Legendary Blueberry Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 16g carbs/6g fat. Verified ~22g total carbs/8g fat. Same pattern as other pastries — DB understates total carbs and fat.

name: Legendary Brown Sugar Cinnamon Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 16g carbs/6g fat/8g fiber. Verified 22g total carbs/8g fat/9g fiber. DB understates carbs and fat. Fiber close (8 vs 9).

name: Legendary Caramel Sticky Bun Sweet Roll
notes: Calories match at 200. DB says 18g carbs/7g fat/9g fiber/0g sugar. Verified 23g carbs/9g fat/10g fiber/1g sugar. DB understates total carbs (18 vs 23) and fat (7 vs 9).

name: Legendary Cherry Crumble Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 16g carbs/6g fat. Verified ~22g total carbs/8g fat. Same pattern as all Legendary pastries — DB used net carbs instead of total carbs and understated fat.

name: Legendary Chocolate Cake Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 16g carbs/6g fat. Verified ~22g total carbs/8g fat. Same systematic issue across all Legendary pastries.

name: Legendary Cinnamon Crumble Donut (2-pack)

name: Legendary Cinnamon Sweet Roll
notes: Calories match at 200. DB says 18g carbs/7g fat/9g fiber. Verified 22g carbs/10g fat/9g fiber. DB carbs understated (18 vs 22) and fat understated (7 vs 10). Fiber matches.

name: Legendary Hot Fudge Sundae Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 16g carbs/6g fat. Verified ~22g total carbs/8g fat per pastry line standard. Same systematic DB issue.

name: Legendary Pink Sprinkle Donut (2-pack)

name: Legendary Vanilla Glazed Donut (2-pack)

name: Legendary Wild Berry Sweet Roll

name: Protein Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 22g carbs which matches verified total carbs (most pastry flavors are 20-22g). DB has 0g fiber which should be ~8g. Fat listed as 6g in DB vs 8g verified. This is the generic pastry entry — carbs happen to match but fiber and fat need update.

name: Strawberry Protein Pastry
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 22g carbs/8g fat/9g fiber/1g sugar. Verified ~22g carbs/8g fat/8g fiber/0g sugar. All values very close. Minor fiber difference (9 vs 8). Calories and protein confirmed.

name: The Complete Cremes (Chocolate)
notes: Calories match at 130. DB says 9g carbs/5g fat/3g sugar. Verified 14g carbs/6g fat/7g sugar. DB total carbs severely understated (9 vs 14) and sugar (3 vs 7). Fat slightly off (5 vs 6).

name: Milk Chocolate Covered Almonds
notes: Calories match at 140. DB says 18g carbs/12g fat/3g fiber. Verified 12g total carbs/11g fat/5g fiber. DB total carbs overstated (18 vs 12) and fiber understated (3 vs 5). DB may have included sugar alcohols in carb count differently.

name: Milk Chocolate Style Bar
notes: Calories match at 180. DB says 18g carbs/9g fat/5g fiber/0g sugar/2g protein. Verified 25g carbs/14g fat/8g fiber/4g sugar/3g protein. Significant discrepancies in fat (9 vs 14), total carbs (18 vs 25), fiber (5 vs 8), sugar (0 vs 4). DB values appear to be net carb focused or from an older formulation.
